title: UB7 0AE, SUEZ Recycling and Recovery UK Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3626SG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: SUEZ Recycling and Recovery UK Ltd   Installation name: Holloway Lane AD Facility   Permit number: EPR/GP3626SG/A001   "
